title: 🔐Privacy & Data Use Policy
body:
At ChampionsReviews.Com, your privacy, data security, and trust are our top priorities.
We strictly comply with Google’s Privacy and Advertising Policies, international data protection standards (including GDPR and COPPA), and all applicable advertising laws.
This policy explains how we collect, handle, and protect user data across our website and advertising systems.

🎯 1. Personalized Advertising

We do not use Google products, ad codes, or affiliate tracking tools to personalize ads or collect audience data based on any of the following sensitive categories:

  • Activity by users under 13 years of age.
  • Visits to child-directed content or apps.
  • Visits to adult, gambling, or government-related websites.
  • Sensitive information such as:
    • Health or medical history
    • Financial or credit status
    • Racial or ethnic identity
    • Religious or political beliefs
    • Criminal history
    • Sexual orientation or behavior
    • Trade union membership

Additionally (U.S. & Canada):
We do not target ads based on gender, age, parental status, marital status, or ZIP code for:

  • Housing or real estate offers
  • Job listings or employment opportunities
  • Financial products or services (e.g., loans, credit cards, debt management)

✅ Our Commitment:
All personalized ad data used through Google Ads or Affiliate Networks on ChampionsReviews.Com follows industry standards such as the Digital Advertising Alliance (DAA) and IAB Europe’s Framework.

📜 2. Privacy Disclosures

We maintain a transparent Privacy Policy that:

  • Clearly explains what data is collected, shared, or used via Google and affiliate advertising services.
  • Discloses the use of cookies, web beacons, IP addresses, and analytics tools.
  • Notifies users that third parties may use cookies or beacons for advertising or analytics purposes.

For details on how Google uses data, visit:
👉 How Google uses data when you use our partners’ sites or apps

✅ Our Commitment:
We make sure every user is aware of how and why their data may be collected — always with transparency and respect.

🍪 3. Cookies on Google Domains

We do not:

  • Set, modify, intercept, or delete cookies on Google’s domains.
  • Attempt to alter user data stored on Google-controlled systems.

✅ Our Commitment:
All cookies used on ChampionsReviews.Com are domain-restricted, secure, and fully compliant with Google’s cookie policies.

👤 4. Identifying Users

We strictly prohibit any action that:

  • Shares personally identifiable information (PII) with Google.
  • Attempts to merge identifiable data with anonymized data without user consent.
  • Circumvents Google’s data aggregation or anonymization processes.

We fully comply with the EU User Consent Policy and obtain clear opt-in consent where required.

✅ Our Commitment:
User identities and data are never shared, sold, or cross-linked with third-party datasets.

📍 5. Device and Location Data

If any location-based features are used (for example, local deals or geo-based analytics), we:

  • Inform users through a clear pop-up or interstitial notice.
  • Obtain express opt-in consent before collecting or processing location data.
  • Transmit such data securely via encrypted channels only.
  • Clearly disclose the purpose of using location data in our Privacy Policy.

✅ Our Commitment:
We use location data responsibly, securely, and only when consented to.

🧒 6. Children’s Online Privacy (COPPA)

We comply fully with the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA).
Accordingly, we:

  • Identify and tag any content intended for children.
  • Do not collect personal data from children under 13 years of age.
  • Do not serve personalized or remarketing ads on child-directed pages or apps.

✅ Our Commitment:
Protecting children’s online safety is non-negotiable. All content and advertising systems are filtered for compliance.

🚫 7. Security & Abuse Prevention

We prohibit:

  • The placement of ads or links on pages containing spam, malware, or abusive experiences.
  • Hosting or linking to any software that harms or deceives users (including viruses, spyware, ransomware, or fake security software).
  • Ads that violate the Better Ads Standards or cause intrusive user experiences.

✅ Our Commitment:
All content and advertising are scanned regularly to ensure they remain free of harmful or deceptive material.

🏷️ 8. Authorized Inventory

We only serve Google or affiliate ads on domains where ChampionsReviews.Com is clearly identified as an authorized seller through verified ads.txt files.
We do not display ads on unauthorized domains or content syndication partners.

✅ Our Commitment:
Every ad placement and domain relationship is transparent, traceable, and legitimate.

🌍 9. Sanctions and Compliance

In accordance with international sanctions laws (OFAC, BIS, and others), ChampionsReviews.Com and its advertising partners:

  • Do not operate in or on behalf of restricted countries or regions, including:
    • Crimea
    • Cuba
    • Iran
    • North Korea
    • Donetsk & Luhansk regions of Ukraine
  • Do not partner with or serve entities or individuals listed on international sanctions registers.

✅ Our Commitment:
We ensure all partners, advertisers, and data processors operate within compliant, legally approved regions.

⚙️ 10. Policy Enforcement

Violations of these privacy or advertising standards may result in:

  • Immediate removal of related content or ads,
  • Account suspension or termination, and/or
  • Reporting to relevant authorities when required.

We regularly review all ad placements, cookies, and affiliate systems to ensure full transparency and compliance.

Last Updated: October 2025
Contact Us: https://www.championsreviews.com/contact
